design_system.theme_strategy: Light Mode (Primary) with localized Dark Mode for High-Density Dashboards
design_system.emotional_archetype: Organic & Earthy (Trust/Growth) mixed with Swiss/High-Contrast (Data Clarity)

headings.usage: Use for all page titles, section headers, and modal titles. Tracking tight (-0.02em).

body.usage: Use for all paragraphs, inputs, table data, and labels.

mono.usage: Use for IDs, API keys, and financial transaction codes.

gradients.brand_mesh: radial-gradient(at 0% 0%, rgba(74, 222, 128, 0.15) 0px, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(at 100% 100%, rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.15) 0px, transparent 50%)

landing_page.hero_style: Split Asymmetry (Text Left, Visual Right with floating elements)

dashboard.card_style: Flat with 1px border and distinct header area

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-transform active:scale-95 shadow-lg shadow-slate-900/20
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium
buttons.brand: bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500 to-green-400 text-white font-bold hover:shadow-xl transition-all

cards.dashboard: bg-white border border-slate-100 shadow-sm rounded-xl overflow-hidden
cards.feature: bg-slate-50/50 hover:bg-white border border-transparent hover:border-slate-200 transition-all duration-300 rounded-2xl p-8 group

inputs.default: h-12 bg-white border-slate-200 focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/20 rounded-lg

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. THEME SETUP: Update tailwind.config.js to use the provided color palette. Add 'Outfit' and 'Plus Jakarta Sans' fonts via Google Fonts.
2. LANDING PAGE: Build a high-impact 'Tetris' grid hero. Use the 'brand_mesh' gradient as a subtle background. Implement 'lenis' for smooth scrolling.
3. DASHBOARD: Create a 'Bento' grid layout. Use the 'neutral.surface' (#f8fafc) background for the app area, and pure white cards. Do NOT make everything white.
4. COMPONENTS: Customize Shadcn components. Remove the default 'radius-md' look and go for either full pill (rounded-full) or tight (rounded-lg) to be distinct.
5. CHARTS: Use Recharts with the specific palette: Green (#4ade80) for Growth, Blue (#3b82f6) for Retention, Obsidian (#020617) for Financials.
6. MICRO-INTERACTIONS: Add hover states to every interactive element. Use `transform: translateY(-2px)` on cards.

7. IMAGE HANDLING: Use `next/image` or standard `img` with `object-cover` and rounded corners. Always add a subtle border (`border-white/10` or `border-black/5`) to images to separate them from the bg.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts.
Create depth through layered design elements (z-index).
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters.
Interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
